body:
## Summary

49 cytochrome-P450 monooxygenase activity terms with EC:1.14.14.x xrefs are currently descendants of GO:0016709 *oxidoreductase activity, acting on paired donors, ... NAD(P)H as one donor, and incorporation of one atom of oxygen* (EC:1.14.13.-). They should be reparented under GO:0016712 (EC:1.14.14.-, *...reduced flavin or flavoprotein as one donor, and incorporation of one atom of oxygen*), matching the IUBMB 2018 reclassification of most cytochrome-P450 enzymes from EC sub-subclass 1.14.13 to 1.14.14.

The target grouping term GO:0016712 already exists with `xref: EC:1.14.14.- {source="skos:exactMatch"}`.

## Affected terms (49)

|---|---|---|

| GO:0008398 | sterol 14-demethylase activity | 1.14.14.154 |
| GO:0010295 | (+)-abscisic acid 8'-hydroxylase activity | 1.14.14.137 |
| GO:0016710 | trans-cinnamate 4-monooxygenase activity | 1.14.14.91 |

| GO:0050598 | taxane 13-alpha-hydroxylase activity | 1.14.14.106 |

## Context

Identified as the largest cluster of EC/GO hierarchy inconsistencies in a programmatic review of the GO:0016491 oxidoreductase subtree: each term's `skos:exactMatch` EC is in sub-subclass 1.14.14, but the nearest EC-bearing is_a ancestor (GO:0016709) carries EC:1.14.13.-, which is not an EC-class ancestor of 1.14.14.x.

## Suggested fix

For each term above, replace `is_a: GO:0016709` with `is_a: GO:0016712` (or a more specific descendant of GO:0016712 where one exists).
title: Reparent 49 EC:1.14.14.x terms from GO:0016709 to GO:0016712 (CYP450 reclassification)
